obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (t : Tree) (p q : Int), IsBst t ∧ HasKey t p ∧ HasKey t q
obligations.nl_gloss: Input is a BST and both query keys are present.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (t : Tree) (p q a : Int), lcaBst t p q = some a → ∃ sub : Tree, IsSubtree sub t ∧ (match sub with | Tree.nil => False | Tree.node _ k _ => k = a) ∧ HasKey sub p ∧ HasKey sub q
obligations.nl_gloss: The returned key is the root of a subtree containing both queries.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (t : Tree) (p q a : Int), lcaBst t p q = some a → ∀ (sub : Tree), IsProperSubtree sub t → (match sub with | Tree.nil => True | Tree.node _ k _ => k = a → False) → HasKey sub p → HasKey sub q → False
obligations.nl_gloss: No proper subtree that is not rooted at the returned key contains both queries and sits strictly below the LCA.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (t : Tree) (p : Int), IsBst t → HasKey t p → lcaBst t p p = some p
obligations.nl_gloss: LCA of a key with itself is that key.
